response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced software developer with a strong background in web technologies, distributed microservices, and software craftsmanship, he falls significantly short of the core technical requirements for this role. Specifically, the position requires 8 years of C++ programming and deep expertise in cloud compute platforms, whereas his C++ experience is limited to a brief 7-month stint in 2015 and his recent stack leans heavily toward Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang.
strengths: Strong background in software craftsmanship, testing (TDD), and establishing engineering best practices.
Experience building and scaling distributed microservices, including systems handling millions of requests per second.
Demonstrated passion for mentorship, leading workshops, coding dojos, and technical courses.
concerns: Fails to meet the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming experience, with less than a year of professional exposure.
Lacks deep, specialized experience in internal cloud compute platforms, hardware architecture, and low-level storage technologies.
Does not possess a dedicated technical leadership background specifically managing and mentoring cloud infrastructure or DevOps teams.
